company.hq: Shenzhen, China (Shenzhen Asmax Infinite Technology Co., Ltd., Room 803, Building B4, Keyling Science Park); no external funding disclosed
company.founded: Brand launched in China in 2023; team claims 20+ years of mobile/IoT R&D (one site references 2004 origins)
company.positioning: Value-priced 'Smart Riding IoT Ecosystem': AI voice-controlled mesh intercoms with cloud (Mesh+'5G'/cellular) intercom, marketed as a budget alternative to Cardo/Sena; also sells smart air pumps. No smart helmet shipping despite ecosystem marketing (no 'X1 smart helmet' exists).
company.channels: DTC sites (asmaxworld.com US, asmaxconnect.com global, asmaxmoto.com corporate), Amazon US/JP, AliExpress/Alibaba, SE Asia dealers (Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore), EU retailers (e.g. Chromeburner); claims 30+ countries, 2,000+ partner stores, 100,000+ connected riders; exhibited EICMA 2025 and AIMExpo 2026

products.name: F1s
products.intercom_tech: Mesh + Bluetooth 5.3 dual-chip; CloudTalk cloud/cross-brand mode; universal BT pairing
products.audio: Triple noise reduction (ENC), music sharing, Insta360 wireless audio integration
features: Hi Max offline AI voice control (EN/ES/JA, no internet needed)
Fast charge: 10 min = 3 hrs intercom, 50 min full charge
products.notes: US flagship on asmaxworld.com. Amazon US listing claims '5-mile intercom'; real-world reviews report ~0.7-1.2 km between closest riders. M... (truncated)
